projects.title: TaskPilot
projects.oneliner: CLI to-do manager built for ruthless productivity.
projects.description: A Python-based command-line task management tool designed for efficiency. Supports task creation, listing, prioritization, and deletion — all from the terminal.

projects.title: VaultLocker
projects.oneliner: Cryptographic file encryption for sensitive data.
projects.description: A file encryption utility that uses cryptographic algorithms to secure sensitive files. Supports encrypt/decrypt operations with a passphrase interface.

projects.title: Password Validator
projects.oneliner: Intelligent password strength assessor with rule enforcement.
projects.description: A Python utility that evaluates password strength based on length, character diversity, and common pattern detection.

projects.title: Shell-Python
projects.oneliner: A Bash shell simulator written entirely in Python.
projects.description: An exploration into shell internals — handles command parsing, execution, piping, and basic built-in commands.

projects.title: KeySprint
projects.oneliner: Real-time typing speed tester — WPM and accuracy.
projects.description: A Python typing speed test application that measures words per minute and accuracy in real time with multiple test modes.

about.bio:
I'm a 3rd year Computer Science & Engineering student at Maharaj Vijayaram Gajapathi Raj College of Engineering, Vizianagaram. My journey in tech is driven by curiosity — I love understanding how things work at a fundamental level, whether it's a shell interpreter, a neural network, or a network packet.

I've had the opportunity to intern remotely across AI, machine learning, and networking domains, each adding a new layer to how I think about problems. I'm passionate about open source, building tools that are actually useful, and continuously pushing my own limits.

When I'm not coding, you'll find me tinkering with Linux setups, exploring algorithms, or participating in hackathons.

contact.copy: Whether you have an internship opportunity, a project idea, or just want to connect — I'm always open to a conversation. Drop me a message and I'll get back to you.
